x_snc_airop_check_definition.ai_justification: License entitlement records are the core dataset Now Assist SAM analyzes for AI optimization recommendations. Without sufficient entitlements, AI has no basis for identifying over-licensing, compliance risks, or cost reduction opportunities.
x_snc_airop_check_definition.check_script: (function() { var ga = new GlideAggregate("alm_license"); ga.addQuery("active", true); ga.addAggregate("COUNT"); ga.query(); var count = ga.next() ? parseInt(ga.getAggregate("COUNT")) : 0; if (count >= 50) { return { status: "ready", actualValue: count + " active license entitlement records", finding: count + " active license records. Now Assist SAM has sufficient entitlement data for AI-powered license optimization analysis." }; } else if (count >= 10) { return { status: "needs_attention", actualValue: count + " active license entitlement records", finding: "Only " + count + " active license records (target: 50+). Now Assist SAM AI analysis will have limited coverage across the software estate." }; } else { return { status: "not_ready", actualValue: count + " active license entitlement records", finding: "Only " + count + " active license records. Insufficient entitlement data for meaningful Now Assist SAM AI license optimization recommendations." }; } })
x_snc_airop_check_definition.remediation_guidance: Import software license entitlements from publisher contracts and procurement records. Navigate to Software Asset Management > Licenses > New to create entitlement records for all managed software titles.
